Demurrer To Complaint By Moving Party, Defendant, Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., Executor Of The Estate.
Off Calendar Apr-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- defendant WELLS FARGO BANK's demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 1st Cause of Action for breach of contract. As to common count claim -- sustained with leave to amend -- failure to state the remedy is reasonable value of services performed. 10 days leave to amend. (JJM/kh) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
